title: Geita District Council (Hides and Skin Dressing and Drying Fees) By-laws, 2003
title_en: Geita District Council (Hides and Skin Dressing and Drying Fees) By-laws, 2003

provisions.title: Citation application and commencement
provisions.content: These By-laws may be cited as the Geita District Council (Hides and Skin Dressing and Drying Fees) By-laws, 2003 and shall be deemed to have come into operation on the first day of January, 2003 and shall apply throughout the area of jurisdiction of the Geita District Council.

provisions.title: Imposition of fees
provisions.content: The fees specified under the schedule to these By-laws shall be changed for dressing and drying of hides and skin.

provisions.title: Appointment of agent
provisions.content: The Geita District Council may appoint an agent or agents to col­lect the fees specified under By-law 2 of these By-laws on its behalf.

provisions.title: Revocation of GN. No. 195
provisions.content: The Geita District Council (Hides and Skin Dressing and Drying Fees) By-laws, 1992 are hereby revoked.

provisions.title: Revocation not to waive liability
provisions.content: Notwithstanding the repeal of these By-laws the fees payable under the revoked By-laws shall be due until paid and nothing done in pursuance of the repealed By-laws shall be invalidated by reason of such repeal.

provisions.title: Offence
provisions.content: Any person who refuses or fails to pay the fees chargeable under these By-laws is guilty of an offence and is liable upon conviction to a fine not Exceeding twenty thousand shillings. Schedule Hide of cattle Tshs. 500/= per each Skin of goat Tshs. 300/= per each Skin of sheep Tshs. 300/= per each History of this document 04 April 2003 this version Published in Gazette of the United Republic of Tanzania 14 01 January 2003 Commenced Related documents More documents like this one [] [] [] [] ▲ To the top > Contact us Visit our Twitter/X profile Visit our Linked In profile Visit our YouTube channel About TanzLII TanzLII is operated by the Judiciary of Tanzania and the Office of the Attorney General, Chief Parliamentary Draftsman, and publishes the law of Tanzania for free online access for all.
